# kCTFontDesignerNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontDesignerNameKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontdesignernamekey)

-  kCTFontDesignerNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontDesignerNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontDesignerNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontdesignernamekey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the designer name.
